page.name: FX 1

pad1.name: ECHO OUT
pad1.color: param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Echo Out' ? effect_active 1 ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : color 'white'

page.pad1: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Echo Out' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Echo Out' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Echo Out' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Echo Out' : effect_select 1 'Echo Out' & effect_active 1 on )

pad2.name: LOOP ROLL
pad2.color: param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'loop roll' ? effect_active 1 ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : color 'white'

page.pad2: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'loop roll' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'loop roll' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'loop roll' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'loop roll' : effect_select 1 'loop roll' & effect_active 1 on )
page.pad3: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Cut' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Cut' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Cut' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Cut' : effect_select 1 'Cut' & effect_active 1 on )
page.pad4: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Filter' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Filter' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Filter' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Filter' : effect_select 1 'Filter' & effect_active 1 on )
page.pad5: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Reverb' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Reverb' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Reverb' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Reverb' : effect_select 1 'Reverb' & effect_active 1 on )
page.pad6: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Noise' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Noise' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Noise' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Noise' : effect_select 1 'Noise' & effect_active 1 on )
page.pad7: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Distortion' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Distortion' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Distortion' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Distortion' : effect_select 1 'Distortion' & effect_active 1 on )
page.pad8: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Flanger' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Flanger' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Flanger' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Flanger' : effect_select 1 'Flanger' & effect_active 1 on )
page.pad9: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Spiral' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Spiral' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Spiral' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Spiral' : effect_select 1 'Spiral' & effect_active 1 on )
page.pad10: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Pitch' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Pitch' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Pitch' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Pitch' : effect_select 1 'Pitch' & effect_active 1 on )
page.pad11: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Vocals' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Vocals' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Vocals' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Vocals' : effect_select 1 'Vocals' & effect_active 1 on )
page.pad12: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Delay' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Delay' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Delay' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Delay' : effect_select 1 'Delay' & effect_active 1 on )

param2.name: `var 'fx1push' 0 ? get_text "ON / OFF" : var 'fx1push' 1 ? get_text "PUSH ON" : get_text "PUSH OFF"`

page.shift_pad1: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Beatgrid' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Beatgrid' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Beatgrid' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Beatgrid' : effect_select 1 'Beatgrid' & effect_active 1 on )
page.shift_pad2: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Backspin' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Backspin' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Backspin' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Backspin' : effect_select 1 'Backspin' & effect_active 1 on )
page.shift_pad3: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Brake' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Brake' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Brake' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Brake' : effect_select 1 'Brake' & effect_active 1 on )
page.shift_pad4: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Phaser' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Phaser' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Phaser' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Phaser' : effect_select 1 'Phaser' & effect_active 1 on )
page.shift_pad5: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Crush' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Crush' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Crush' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Crush' : effect_select 1 'Crush' & effect_active 1 on )
page.shift_pad6: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Gate' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Gate' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Gate' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Gate' : effect_select 1 'Gate' & effect_active 1 on )
page.shift_pad7: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Jet' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Jet' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Jet' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Jet' : effect_select 1 'Jet' & effect_active 1 on )
page.shift_pad8: var_equal 'fx1push' 1 ? effect_select 1 'Transpose' & effect_active 1 off & effect_active 1 on while_pressed : var_equal 'fx1push' 2 ? effect_select 1 'Transpose' & effect_active 1 on & effect_active 1 off while_pressed : param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Transpose' ? ( effect_active 1 ? blink 300ms & effect_active 1 off : effect_active 1 on ) : ( effect_active 1 ? effect_select 1 'Transpose' : effect_select 1 'Transpose' & effect_active 1 on )

page.name: FX 1

pad1.name: ECHO OUT
pad1.color: param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Echo Out' ? effect_active 1 ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : color 'white'

page.pad1: param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'Echo Out' ? effect_active 1 : effect_select 1 'Echo Out' & effect_active 1 on

pad2.name: LOOP ROLL
pad2.color: param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'loop roll' ? effect_active 1 ? color 'magenta' : color 'white' : color 'white'

page.pad2: param_equal `get_effect_name 1` 'loop roll' ? effect_active 1 : effect_select 1 'loop roll' & effect_active 1 on
